use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and applications
Navigation and link-based interactions with multiple visual states
Destructive action buttons with confirmation states
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars and actions
ai_summary: A flexible, accessible button component built with Radix UI Slot and Tailwind CSS using class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes, with disabled and focus states. Designed as a reusable atomic component for any UI system.
